price_basis: Individual expansion listed price; confirm any required Stocks base plan at checkout
coverage: U.S. equities; analyst ratings, firm, analyst and price-target history from 2011-12-08
review_note: Optional user-funded connector candidate. TargetAudit may process an authorized local export only for uses allowed by the user's license; it must not bundle rows or publish rankings to others under individual terms.

price_basis: Official All Access pricing; includes a 30-day trial
coverage: U.S., Canada and U.K. stocks; more than one million analyst recommendations; CSV export described for up to six months of recent ratings data
review_note: Strong low-cost candidate for private pilot imports and coverage checks. Six-month advertised export does not satisfy the one-year historical scoring objective without a separate licensed feed or permission.

price_basis: Official plan price; premium trial advertised for USD 1
coverage: Tracks performance of more than 4000 Wall Street analysts and exposes top-analyst recommendations; structured historical target export is not confirmed
review_note: Useful private methodology benchmark rather than a confirmed target-ingestion feed. Terms permit exported data for internal research and prohibit resale or redistribution.

price_basis: No public list price found on the official product page
coverage: U.S. equities; historical data advertised since 2013 with firm, analyst, rating and prior/current target fields
review_note: Direct data licensing route requires a written quote and public derived-output rights before activation.

extension_name: AnaChart Price Targets and Ratings Feed
price_basis: No public list price found during review
coverage: Historical analyst price targets, ratings, consensus data and analyst accuracy feeds
review_note: Marketplace-feed alternative identified; it is not an enabled source until scope price and publication rights are documented.

price_basis: Commercial redistribution license requires contacting GuruFocus
coverage: Official FAQ identifies Refinitiv and Morningstar as analyst-estimate sources; individual historical target or rating endpoint still requires confirmation
review_note: Do not implement as a historical-target connector until GuruFocus confirms row-level target coverage and licensed output scope in writing.
